description_long: This object is a low-profile hydraulic floor jack, commonly used for lifting vehicles in garages or workshops. It features a long, sturdy metal handle attached to a blue-painted steel body, which houses the hydraulic mechanism. The jack has four wheels, with two larger fixed wheels at the rear and two smaller swivel casters at the front for maneuverability. The lifting pad is located at the front, designed to make contact with the underside of a vehicle. The surface shows signs of wear, with some scuff marks and scratches visible on the blue paint. The overall construction is robust, with a focus on durability and functionality for heavy lifting tasks.
description: A blue, heavy-duty hydraulic floor jack with a long metal handle and four wheels, designed for lifting vehicles. The jack shows signs of use, with visible wear and a sturdy steel construction.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated blue steel body, long handle, and all four wheels, with the lifting pad visible at the front.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the lifting pad, the two small front wheels, and the narrow profile of the jack.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the handle, body, and rear wheels, with the lifting pad at the far end.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the length of the handle, the blue body, and the arrangement of the wheels.
attribute_fork_arms: No visible fork arms are present; instead, there is a single round lifting pad at the front, designed for contact with vehicle lift points. The pad is metallic and slightly raised, with a textured surface for grip.
attribute_overhead_guard: There is no overhead guard present on this object.
attribute_mast: No mast is visible; the object features a low-profile hydraulic lifting mechanism integrated into the main body, with no upright structure.
attribute_operator_seat: There is no operator seat; the object is operated manually via the long handle.
attribute_warning_lights: No warning lights are visible on this object.
